sig_lite.name: SIG Lite
sig_lite.description: A condensed vendor risk questionnaire covering key security domains. Suitable for initial assessments of medium-criticality vendors.

questions.question: Does the organization maintain a current inventory of all information assets (hardware, software, data)?
questions.guidance: Look for CMDB or equivalent asset register updated at least annually.

questions.question: Are assets classified according to sensitivity and criticality?
questions.guidance: Asset classification scheme with at least 3 tiers (e.g., Public, Internal, Confidential).

questions.question: Is there a documented data retention and disposal policy with enforced destruction standards?
questions.guidance: NIST SP 800-88 or equivalent media sanitization standard.

questions.question: Does the organization enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all remote access and privileged accounts?
questions.guidance: MFA required for VPN, admin portals, email, and all SaaS tools.

questions.question: Are access rights reviewed at least annually and upon role changes?
questions.guidance: Evidence: access review reports, terminated user logs.

questions.question: Is privileged access managed through a Privileged Access Management (PAM) solution or equivalent controls?
questions.guidance: PAM tools (CyberArk, BeyondTrust, etc.) or documented just-in-time access controls.

questions.question: Does the organization have a documented and tested Business Continuity Plan (BCP)?
questions.guidance: BCP tested at least annually; results documented.

questions.question: Are Recovery Time Objectives (RTO) and Recovery Point Objectives (RPO) defined and achievable for all critical services?
questions.guidance: SLAs for critical services with evidence of DR test results meeting targets.

questions.question: Are all changes to production systems subject to a formal change management process?
questions.guidance: Change Advisory Board (CAB) or equivalent approval process with rollback plans.

questions.question: Is security testing (SAST/DAST/penetration testing) required before production deployment of new software?
questions.guidance: CI/CD pipeline includes security gates; pen test results available.

questions.question: Is data encrypted at rest using AES-128 or stronger for all storage containing sensitive information?
questions.guidance: Encryption applied to databases, file stores, backup media.

questions.question: Is data encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher for all external communications?
questions.guidance: TLS certificates, configuration scans showing no deprecated protocols.

questions.question: Is customer/client data logically or physically separated from other tenants?
questions.guidance: Data isolation architecture documentation or third-party attestation.

questions.question: Are background checks conducted on employees with access to sensitive systems prior to hire?
questions.guidance: Background check policy; third-party screening provider.

questions.question: Is mandatory security awareness training provided at least annually to all staff?
questions.guidance: Training completion records; phishing simulation results.

questions.question: Does the organization have a documented Incident Response Plan (IRP) that is tested at least annually?
questions.guidance: IRP document, tabletop exercise records from last 12 months.

questions.question: Can the organization notify affected customers of a security breach within 72 hours of detection?
questions.guidance: Breach notification SLA in contracts; GDPR/PIPEDA breach notification procedure.

questions.question: Are vulnerability scans performed at least monthly and critical findings remediated within 30 days?
questions.guidance: Scan reports; remediation SLA evidence.

questions.question: Does the organization conduct external penetration testing at least annually by a qualified third party?
questions.guidance: Pen test report from last 12 months; scope and findings summary.

questions.question: Does the organization hold a current SOC 2 Type II report, ISO 27001 certificate, or equivalent third-party attestation?
questions.guidance: Recent (within 12 months) audit report or certificate.

questions.question: Does the organization conduct security assessments of its own critical suppliers and sub-processors?
questions.guidance: Vendor risk management program; sub-processor list.

questions.question: Is network segmentation implemented to isolate systems processing sensitive data?
questions.guidance: Network architecture diagram showing segmentation; firewall rules.

questions.question: Is endpoint detection and response (EDR) deployed on all endpoints and servers?
questions.guidance: EDR coverage report; alert triage process.

questions.question: Are data processing agreements (DPAs) in place with all sub-processors handling personal data?
questions.guidance: DPA templates; executed agreements with key sub-processors.

questions.question: Does the organization have a documented privacy policy and designated privacy officer or equivalent role?
questions.guidance: Published privacy policy URL; DPO appointment documentation.

questions.question: Is a formal risk management program in place with a risk register reviewed at least annually?
questions.guidance: Risk register document; evidence of risk treatment decisions.

questions.question: Are backups taken at least daily and tested for recoverability quarterly?
questions.guidance: Backup schedule; restore test records.

questions.question: Are backup copies stored offsite or in a geographically separate cloud region?
questions.guidance: Offsite/cloud backup configuration; geo-redundancy documentation.

questions.question: Are security logs centrally aggregated and retained for a minimum of 12 months?
questions.guidance: SIEM configuration; log retention policy.

questions.question: Are alerts for security events reviewed and triaged within 24 hours during business hours?
questions.guidance: SOC triage SLA; alert response metrics.

caiq.name: CAIQ
caiq.full_name: Consensus Assessments Initiative Questionnaire (CAIQ) — CSA Cloud Control Matrix
caiq.description: Cloud-specific security questionnaire aligned to the CSA Cloud Control Matrix v4. Suitable for SaaS and IaaS vendor assessments.

questions.question: Does the provider follow a documented secure software development lifecycle (SSDLC) including threat modeling?
questions.guidance: OWASP SAMM or equivalent SSDLC documentation.

questions.question: Are application security tests (SAST, DAST, SCA) integrated into the CI/CD pipeline?
questions.guidance: Pipeline configuration evidence; findings trend reports.

questions.question: Does the provider have documented, tested, and current business continuity and disaster recovery plans for the cloud service?
questions.guidance: BCP/DRP documents with test results from last 12 months.

questions.question: Are cloud infrastructure changes managed through automated CI/CD with required approvals and testing gates?
questions.guidance: IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation) with version control; approval workflows.

questions.question: Is customer data encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.2+ with customer-managed key options available?
questions.guidance: Encryption architecture documentation; key management policy.

questions.question: Does the provider maintain a current data flow map showing where customer data is stored, processed, and transferred?
questions.guidance: Data flow diagrams; sub-processor list with geo-locations.

questions.question: Can customers export or delete all their data on request and within contractually defined timeframes?
questions.guidance: Data portability and deletion SLA; documented process.

questions.question: Does the provider have a current third-party attestation (SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, CSA STAR Level 2, or FedRAMP)?
questions.guidance: Report or certificate from last 12 months; scope must cover the offered service.

questions.question: Are employees with access to customer data subject to background checks and annual security training?
questions.guidance: Background check policy; training completion metrics.

questions.question: Does the provider enforce MFA and role-based access control (RBAC) for all personnel accessing production systems?
questions.guidance: IAM configuration; MFA enforcement policy; access reviews.

questions.question: Does the provider support SAML 2.0 or OIDC SSO integration for enterprise customer authentication?
questions.guidance: SSO documentation; supported identity providers list.

questions.question: Is network segmentation implemented to isolate customer data and production environments from development/test?
questions.guidance: Network architecture diagram; VPC/VLAN segmentation evidence.

questions.question: Does the provider offer documented APIs and data export formats ensuring customer data portability without vendor lock-in?
questions.guidance: API documentation; supported export formats (CSV, JSON, standard schemas).

questions.question: Does the provider have an incident response plan that includes customer notification within 72 hours of a data breach?
questions.guidance: IRP document; breach notification SLA in contract.

questions.question: Are security events logged and monitored 24/7 with alerts triaged by a security operations function?
questions.guidance: SIEM/SOC setup; 24/7 coverage evidence; alert SLA metrics.

questions.question: Is there a published security status page or equivalent communication channel for service disruptions and incidents?
questions.guidance: Status page URL; incident communication history.

questions.question: Does the provider conduct monthly vulnerability scanning and annual third-party penetration testing of the cloud service?
questions.guidance: Scan schedule; pen test executive summary from last 12 months.

questions.question: Does the provider maintain a list of sub-processors/third parties with access to customer data and notify customers of changes?
questions.guidance: Sub-processor list; change notification process.

questions.question: Are all endpoints accessing production systems enrolled in MDM with enforced encryption and remote wipe capability?
questions.guidance: MDM enrollment report; device compliance policy.

questions.question: Does the provider have a documented information security policy approved by executive leadership, reviewed annually?
questions.guidance: Policy document with approval date and next review date.
